payments.anyPaymentsMade: Have you paid any money to {{claimantName}} since {{claimIssueDate}}?

household.dependantChildren: Do you have any dependent children?

income.universalCreditApplied: Have you applied for Universal Credit?

debts.hasPriorityDebts: Do you have any priority debts?
debts.debtTotal: What is the total amount you owe for all your priority debts?

additional.otherConsiderations: Is there anything else you want to tell the court as part of your response?

counterclaim.reasons: What are your reasons for making the counterclaim?
counterclaim.ordersRequested: What orders are you asking the court to make?
counterclaim.factsForCourt: What facts would you like the court to consider when deciding the claim?
counterclaim.needHelpWithFees: Do you need help paying the counterclaim fee?

statementOfTruth.body: I believe the facts stated in this defence form are true. I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in the truth.
